purpose: The 6-arg extended annotation signature through reason(): clause_zero_grounding_eighths derives its lower bound from len(qualified groundings of clause 0)/8 — metadata only the extended path carries (the per-rule extended_ann_fn flag routes _ground_rule's metadata collection, interpretation.py:227-231) — so crowd(A) = [0.25, 1] proves two qualified edge groundings of connected(x,y) reached the function. atom_trace stays OFF so the metadata flows through the extended-flag gate alone, not the atom-trace branch (the oracle test suite's discipline).
provenance: docs/surface.md fn:add_annotation_function happy-6arg; pyreason.py:1430-1446, interpretation.py:227-231/1002-1039 at the pin; reference fn harness/reference_fns.py; screened live 2026-07-07 (screen_registry.py)
